creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: flo
Date: Wed Feb  6 22:36:48 2013
New Revision: 311803
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/311803

Log:
  Update to 0.8.1
  
  PR:		ports/175903
  Submitted by:	Hung-Yi Chen <gaod@hychen.org> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/www/mitmproxy/Makefile
  head/www/mitmproxy/distinfo
  head/www/mitmproxy/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/mitmproxy/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/mitmproxy/Makefile	Wed Feb  6 22:35:30 2013	(r311802)
+++ head/www/mitmproxy/Makefile	Wed Feb  6 22:36:48 2013	(r311803)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:  mitmproxy
-# Date created:                       08 November 2012
-# Whom:                               Hung-Yi Chen <gaod@hychen.org>
-#
+# Created by: Hung-Yi Chen <gaod@hychen.org>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	mitmproxy
-PORTVERSION=	0.8
+PORTVERSION=	0.8.1
 CATEGORIES=	www python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://mitmproxy.org/download/
 

Modified: head/www/mitmproxy/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/mitmproxy/distinfo	Wed Feb  6 22:35:30 2013	(r311802)
+++ head/www/mitmproxy/distinfo	Wed Feb  6 22:36:48 2013	(r311803)

+SIZE (mitmproxy-0.8.1.tar.gz) = 2782437

 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/libmproxy/contrib/jsbeautifier/unpackers/packer.pyo
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/libmproxy/contrib/jsbeautifier/unpackers/urlencode.pyo
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/libmproxy/platform/__init__.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/libmproxy/platform/common.pyc

 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO/dependency_links.txt
@@ -104,6 +107,7 @@ bin/mitmproxy
 @dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/libmproxy/contrib/jsbeautifier/unpackers
 @dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/libmproxy/contrib/jsbeautifier
 @dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/libmproxy/contrib
+@dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/libmproxy/platform
 @dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/libmproxy

 @dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO
